final_prompt.prompt:
Create a traditional Chinese ink-wash landscape painting (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a 中国传统水墨风格 aesthetic — exact brushwork technique and ink density are yours
Composition: must include proper negative space (留白) for a空灵悠远意境
Subject: must include distant mountains (远山如黛), mist/clouds (云雾缭绕), pine trees (松树), thatched cottage (茅草屋), and an elderly figure fishing by a stream (老者溪边垂钓)
Scene/backdrop: must include the layered landscape with distant mountains, middle-ground mist, and foreground elements
Lighting/mood: needs an ethereal, tranquil atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs an ink-wash monochrome direction with subtle tonal gradations — exact ink values are yours
Materials/textures: needs a rice-paper ink painting surface treatment — exact paper texture and brushstroke weight are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese; must preserve 东方美学意境 and proper compositional留白
Avoid:
